Products›General Purpose Solvents›Isopropyl Alcohol (IPA)
Analytical ReagentIndustrialFood GradeGeneral Purpose Solvents

Isopropyl Alcohol (IPA)

(CH₃)₂CHOH · CAS 67-63-0

High-quality IPA in analytical reagent, industrial, food-grade, and medical-grade variants. Meeting diverse industry standards from USP/EP pharmaceutical to food safety and medical device requirements.

PCB & electronic component cleaningoptical lens cleaninginkjet head cleaning

Molecular Weight

60.10 g/mol

Boiling Point

82.6 °C

Density

0.786 g/mL

Molecular Formula

(CH₃)₂CHOH
CAS Number67-63-0
Boiling Point82.6 °C
Density0.786 g/mL
MW60.10 g/mol

Available Grades

ARINDUSTRIALFOODMEDICAL
Request Sample / QuoteDownload SDS

Analytical Specification

Analytical Specification Table

All values represent maximum allowable limits unless noted ≥. A lot-specific Certificate of Analysis (CoA) with ICP-MS, LPC, and GC data is issued for every shipment. Full data packages available on request.

ParameterTest MethodUnitAR
Assay (GC)GC-FID%≥99.7
Water Content (KF)Karl Fischer%≤0.10
Acidity (as HAc)Titrationppm≤5
Residue on EvaporationGravimetricppm≤5
Color (APHA)ASTM D1209Hazen≤5

★ G5 = SEMI C1 Tier D (6N grade). All metal values by ICP-MS. Particle counts by in-line LPC during ISO Class 3 fill. CoA available on request.

Application Areas

Where Isopropyl Alcohol Is Used

Semiconductor Process

  • PCB & electronic component cleaning
  • optical lens cleaning
  • inkjet head cleaning

Laboratory & Analytical

  • Analytical sample extraction
  • disinfection solutions
  • standard solution preparation

Industrial & Other

  • Pharmaceutical facility sanitation
  • food contact surface cleaning
  • medical device sterilization (70% IPA)
  • personal care & cosmetics
  • screen printing ink dilution

Packaging & Supply

Available Container Formats

500 mL
2.5 L
5 L
25 L
200 L
IBC
